calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul Perdue; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Ezequiel Cazares, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Mosser Companies.
Attorney, Daniel R. Stein representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Jason Honaker is present.
Attorney, William E. Shapiro representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case did settle. The trial date of AUG-24-2009 is vacated.
